ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: di Giovanni Villifranchi Volterrano, all`Illustre Signora Patrona Sua Colendissima, la signora Giovanna Giunta Maffei
ItacWorkItem.Notes: On the frontispiece, the printer declares: `dell`Accademia Venetiana Stampator, et Librar alla Minerva`.
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
